# terrible_community_general_vexata_eg (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Export group name.

### Optional

- `ig` (String) Initiator group name.
- `pg` (String) Port group name.
- `state` (String) Creates export group when present or delete when absent.
- `vg` (String) Volume group name.
